item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Pendekatan ini dipandang sebagai cara efektif untuk menjaga harmoni sosial, meski bisa menimbulkan kontradiksi dengan prinsip-prinsip kebebasan.

notes: Agent A starts with a clear pro-society position and remains broadly society-leaning, but by the final turn qualifies that approach as potentially conflicting with freedom principles. Agent B remains rights-first throughout, with only bounded acknowledgment that communal harmony and public welfare matter. Turn 4 contains non-Latin script in Agent B's English text: "言论自由和due process".
